arts.ttl: 'Unfortunately for them': Alan Shearer predicts who'll triumph between Tottenham and Brentford today
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will hope to follow up their last-gasp League Cup victory over Coventry City in midweek by besting Brentford on Saturday. Spurs were on...

arts.ttl: Postecoglou says Brennan Johnson critics 'would be looking for a change of pants pretty quickly'
arts.sum: The other night he [pretty much] started, he came on after ten minutes so it wasn’t like he was a late sub, but I think when he comes on as a sub, he can make an impact, oppositions will be tired, the game is a bit more open," said the Spurs boss. Ange Postecoglou believes that Brennan Johnson's critics 'would be looking for a change of pants pretty quickly' if they had been in his position for Tottenham's last-gasp winning goal at Coventry.

arts.ttl: Contract talks between 'extraordinary' Spurs target and his club to extend past 2025 have 'broken down' - Romano
arts.sum: The transfer window may now be shut, but clubs like Tottenham Hotspur will no doubt be working hard behind the scenes with regards to targets...

arts.ttl: Tottenham are already two games away from a major Rodrigo Bentancur nightmare scenario
arts.sum: An FA statement read: "It’s alleged that the Tottenham Hotspur midfielder has breached FA Rule E3.1 as he acted in an improper manner and/or used abusive and/or insulting words and/or brought the game into disrepute. Spurs have already missed Bissouma for a couple of games this season, due to injury and they may well have to do without another player for an extended period of time too.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals big reason Tottenham didn't green light Ivan Toney transfer
arts.sum: Tottenham's £55m summer signing Dominic Solanke is yet to score but Ange Postecoglou has outlined exactly why they preferred him over England international Ivan Toney

arts.ttl: Bissouma boost as Spence waits in Postecoglou's dream Tottenham XI vs Brentford
arts.sum: Here we take a look at Ange Postecoglou's dream Tottenham XI for Saturday's Premier League game against Brentford at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium Brentford are on the agenda for Tottenham on Saturday afternoon as Ange Postecoglou's side return to Premier League action.

arts.ttl: Alfie Devine Tottenham reunion, Alejo Veliz Real Madrid chance and Ashley Phillips Stoke wait
arts.sum: Devine had joined Tottenham for the Belgian's last season in N17, with Alderweireld on the bench after playing the first half when the starlet wrote his name into Spurs folklore after becoming the club's youngest ever player and youngest goalscorer with a goal in the 5-0 win over non-league Marine . That was the 20-year-old's only senior appearance for Spurs that season but he was in the squad for the 1-0 defeat at Brighton the very same month, a game in which Alderweireld played the full 90 minutes in a 1-0 defeat.

arts.ttl: Embrace the struggle – Ange Postecoglou insists Tottenham will come good
arts.sum: Spurs narrowly avoided an early Carabao Cup exit which followed back-to-back Premier League defeats.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou delivers eight-word reply to Tottenham critics over "massive distraction"
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou says he is not being swayed by criticism of recent results with the Australian insisting he will not change his ways before Brentford meeting
